en:
Please provide a complete copy of the *Professional Employer Organization (PEO) Workers’ Compensation policy* under which your employees are covered. If a full copy is not readily available, please provide the following documents related to your Workers’ Compensation coverage:

- Declarations Page
- Schedule of Forms and Endorsements
- Alternate Employer Endorsement (or an equivalent form listing the contractor)
- Pages showing the NCCI Class Codes
Workers' Compensation Policy: Date of Commencement
Workers' Compensation Policy: Policy Expiration Date
